TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi beforefieldinit KeepAliveUpdate extends Azure.AI.Agents.Persistent.StreamingUpdate

Docs.summary: Represents a streaming update that serves as a keep-alive signal within a sequence of run steps.
Docs.remarks: A KeepAliveUpdate is used to indicate ongoing activity or maintain a connection during streaming operations. It does not contain any run step data and is typically used internally to prevent timeouts or signal liveness in long-running processes.
